purpose: Parse a lending-market oracle setup as a dependency graph, classify every node by oracle type, audit source primitives, and produce a protocol-fit verdict for Pool or Credit Account analysis.

artifact_layout.return_contract: Return run_artifact_root, run-manifest.json, index.md, per-scope directories, and final verification path. Do not return raw evidence dumps.

global_rules.parent_context_policy: Parent reads stage summaries and final oracle memo first. Parent expands raw RPC/explorer/source evidence only to audit a disputed node, price, bound, timestamp, or formula.
global_rules.subagent_output_policy: Subagents write artifacts to disk and return only artifact paths, node counts, key prices, blockers, and validation status.

stages.title: Scope and acceptance policy
stages.role: Define the market, asset, protocol, user thesis, accepted oracle methodologies, and analysis questions.
validation: position side named or explicitly null
token role named or explicitly null
at least one feed discovery path named
unknown policy fields retained as null

stages.title: Feed inventory and dependency graph
stages.role: Discover the top-level protocol feed and recursively follow child feeds until source primitives are reached.

parallelization.unit: one feed tree per asset or token
parallelization.reason: Each oracle feed tree is scoped to one asset or token, writes under its own token-scope directory, and can be inventoried without source-primitive cross-dependencies.

validation: every non-leaf node has at least one child or explicit no-child explanation
Gearbox feed types follow gearbox-price-feed-parsing.md when protocol is Gearbox

stages.title: Node classification and math reconstruction
stages.role: Classify every graph node as market, fundamental, NAV, hardcoded, or hybrid/composite and explain its mathematical role.
validation: bounds and staleness recorded where exposed
composite math expressed in human terms

stages.title: Source primitive audit
stages.role: Audit Chainlink/Pyth feeds, Curve pools, Pendle factory oracles, ERC4626 vaults, NAV/fundamental reports, and hardcoded assumptions.

stages.title: Stress and tradeoff analysis
stages.role: Map oracle behavior under short-term volatility, long-term depeg, liquidity loss, manipulation, stale reports, and protocol liquidation.
inputs: asset liquidity and redemption facts if available
validation: side-specific borrower and LP effects are explicit

stages.title: Protocol fit and parameter context
stages.role: Evaluate whether the oracle design fits the protocol's LT/LLTV, safe-pricing, main/reserve, staleness, quota, and liquidation design for each relevant position side.
validation: comparison to simpler setup included when requested

stages.title: Final verification
stages.role: Verify graph completeness, classifications, formulas, links, and final memo quality before reporting completion.
validation: every graph leaf has a primitive audit
Gearbox parsing reference applied when protocol is Gearbox
